reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 이전에 사용하던 펫타올이 오래돼서 그런지 흡수력이 떨어지길래 바잇미 펫타올 구매했어요. 와 엄청 도톰해요. 남편이 세차용 타올이냐고 물어볼 정도! 목욕시키고 늘 수건 두장 사용했는데 이건 한장만 써도 거뜬할듯합니다😉
reviews.content_en: My old pet towel wasn't absorbing water well anymore, so I bought the BITE ME pet towel. Wow, it's super thick! My husband even asked if it was a car wash towel! 😉 I used to use two towels when bathing my dog, but I think one of these will be more than enough.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 목욕할때마다 수건 2장씩 썼는데 펫타올은 정말 흡수력이 달라요 꼬똥이라서 털이 금방 자라고 털관리가 중요한데 펫타올로 목욕 후 털 말릴 때 한결 쉬워져서 민족합니다 ! 나중에 또 살 의향 있어용
reviews.content_en: I used to use 2 towels every bath time, but the BITE ME pet towel's absorption is really different! Since I have a Coton de Tulear with fast-growing hair, coat care is important, and drying after bath with the pet towel makes it so much easier. I'm really impressed! I'm definitely planning to buy it again.

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content:
바잇미 드라이미 타월은 견주분들을 위한 필수템!!!👍👍
타월정착을 아직 못해 이것저것 써보던중 세일하길래 한번 사본뒤로 너무좋아 세탁할때를 대비해 한개 더 샀어요
흡수력이 얼마나 좋냐면 기존에 쓰던 드라이미 타월은 손세탁해서 쓰는데 세탁하는물을 다 흡수해버려 곤란할 정도에요 ㅋㅋㅋ
보통 펫타월은 세탁하고나면 흡수력이 떨어진다고 하는데 
드라이미 타월은 세네번 세탁해서 쓰는중인데도 흡수력이 그대로에요 
매일 산책하는 아이라 발씻기는게 일인데 저 이거 사용한뒤로는 산책길이 신나요😆 집에와서 말리는 시간이 훨씬 단축되어 제가 편해요 
대형타월도 너무너무 좋지만 외출용이나 얼굴용으로 제작 더 해주셨으면 하는 제 바램도 적어놓고갈게요🙏
reviews.content_en: The BITE ME DRY ME towel is an absolute must-have for dog parents!!! 👍👍 I was still trying out different towels since I hadn't settled on one yet, so I bought it on sale. I loved it so much that I bought another one in case I need to wash the first. The absorption is so good that when I hand wash it, it absorbs all the wash water—so much so it's actually inconvenient! ㅋㅋㅋ People usually say pet towels lose absorption after washing, but I've used this DRY ME towel 3-4 times already and the absorption is still the same. My dog walks every day so washing paws is basically my job, but after using this, our walks are so much more fun! 😆 Drying time at home is much shorter, which makes my life easier. I love the large towel so much, but I'd really appreciate it if you could also make travel-size or face-size versions. 🙏

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content: 습진이 있는 쿠키 발 씻기고 드라이기로 말리기 정말 힘들었는데 드라이미 사용하고나서부터는 정말 빠르게 말리수도있고 이번여름휴가 가서도 사용하기 딱 좋은 크기와 두께인것같아요!!♥
reviews.content_en: Washing and blow-drying my dog Cookie's paws with eczema was really difficult, but after using DRY ME, I can dry them so much faster. The size and thickness are perfect for our summer vacation too!! ♥

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
타올 진짜좋아서 미니2개구입하고 요거 2개 더 구매했어요
하루두번 산책시키고 얼굴발 다씻기니까 다른타월에비해서 진짜 빨리 물기흡수하네요.짱좋아요
reviews.content_en: I really love this towel! I bought 2 minis first and then got 2 more of these. I walk my dog twice a day and wash face and paws every time. Compared to other towels, this one absorbs water so much faster. It's amazing!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 도톰하고 부들부들해서 그런지 한 두번 쓱쓱 말리고, 드라이기 사용하니 금새 말랐어요 ㅎㅎ 일단 강아지가 드라이미를 엄청 좋아해서.. 평소에도 저렇게 껴안고 있어요ㅠㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋ 뺏으려고 하면 으으렁 댈 정도로.. 자기꺼니까 건들지 말래요 ㅠㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 바잇미 덕분에 스스로 몸을 비비면서 말리는 강아지가 되었네용
reviews.content_en: It's so thick and soft that just one or two quick wipes and a blow dry and it's dry in no time! ㅎㅎ Plus, my dog absolutely loves the DRY ME towel... he even hugs it all the time ㅠㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋ He won't let me take it away—he's like 'this is mine, don't touch it' ㅠㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Thanks to BITE ME, my dog has learned to dry himself by rubbing against it!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 주변에서 추천해줘서 구입했는데 사길 잘 한 것 같아요! 피부가 엄청 예민한 애라 잘못 말리면 몸에서 냄새나고 ㅠㅠ 엄청 가려워 하거든요 바잇미 펫타올로 말리고, 드라이기 하니 금새 마르고 엄청 뽀송해졌어요!
reviews.content_en: A friend recommended it so I bought it and I'm so glad I did! My dog has super sensitive skin and if I don't dry him properly, he gets smelly and itches like crazy ㅠㅠ But after drying with the BITE ME pet towel and blow drying, he dries super fast and his coat is incredibly fluffy!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 원래 수건3장 썼었는데 바잇미 펫타올 1장으로 물기를 빠르게 다 흡수시키니까 정말 좋네요~ 시간 단축도 되고 보들보들해서 강아지도 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: I used to use 3 towels, but now with just 1 BITE ME pet towel, it absorbs all the water so quickly. It's really great! It saves time and the soft texture makes my dog happy too ^^

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
이건 무슨..스폰지 마냥 물기를 쫘악~흡수해요😯
진짜 놀랐어요~
드라이룸쓰는데..  
드라이미 타월로 닦아주고나니
"어?드라이룸 안넣어도 되려나.."싶은정도ㅎㅎ
진즉살걸 그랬네요~
reviews.content_en: It absorbs water like a sponge—just whoooosh! 😯 I was really shocked! I use a drying room normally, but after wiping with the DRY ME towel I thought 'Wait... do I even need to put him in the drying room?' ㅎㅎ I wish I'd bought this sooner!

reviews.name: l****
reviews.content: 다른타월보다 두패로 두툼해서 물흡수가 빠르고 폭신한 느낌이 좋아서 목욕할때가 아니더라도 쇼파에 깔아주면 그위에서 잠도자고 뒹굴뒹굴 하네요
reviews.content_en: It's thicker and more layered than other towels so it absorbs water quickly and feels really fluffy. It's so nice that even when we're not bathing, I lay it on the couch and my dog sleeps and rolls around on it.

reviews.name: 봄****
reviews.content: 크기도 엄청크고 폭신폭신해요 저희 강아지도 좋아합니다ㅎㅎ 세탁할때 망넣어서하니까 손상도 없네용  튼튼한거같아요
reviews.content_en: It's really big and so fluffy! Our pup loves it too haha. When I wash it in a mesh bag, there's no damage at all. It seems really durable!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 부드럽고 좋네요! 9키로 큰 애기도 쏙 감싸줄 충분한 크기에 부드럽다보니까 말리는 시간 괴로워했었는데 수건 위에 앉기도 하는거 보니까 확실히 강아지도 좋아하는 거 같아요. 금방 마르고 부드럽고 참 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so soft and nice! It's big enough to wrap around our 9kg pup completely, and because it's soft, drying time used to be a hassle, but I can see the pup sitting on the towel too, so it's definitely something the dog loves. It dries quickly, stays soft, and it's just great.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 보들보들한 촉감입니다 . 거짓말 아니고 진짜 이걸로만 문질문질 해주면 다 말라요 !! 저 믿고 한 번 사보세요,, ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It has such a soft touch. And no joke, if you just rub with this towel, everything dries completely!! Trust me and give it a try,, ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 냥생 첫 목욕하고 잠들어버린 둘째입니다.ㅎㅎ 냥이라 자주 목욕시킬일은 없겠지만, 아이들 조금이나마 스트레스 덜 받으라고 주문했어요. 처음에 냄새가 좀 나는거 빼고는 좋아요. 촉감도 보들보들하고 흡수력도 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: The second one fell asleep right after their first bath haha. Since they're a cat, I won't be bathing them often, but I ordered this so the kids can have a bit less stress. Except for a slight smell at first, it's great. The texture is so soft and the absorption is really good.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 흡수력 좋아용!!! 피부예민한 저희집 댕댕이한테 흡수력도 좋고 재질도 좋은 바잇미드라이미는 최고네요 피부때문에 위생에 많이 민감한 견주인데 타올은 피부에 직접닿는 물건이라 위생도 따져봤을때 모하나 빠지는게 없네요 잘쓸게요!!!
reviews.content_en: Amazing absorbency!!! For our sensitive-skinned pup, BITE ME DRY ME is the best with great absorbency and quality material. As a pet parent who's sensitive about hygiene because of skin issues, since a towel is something that touches the skin directly, when I checked for hygiene there's nothing lacking. Will use it well!!!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 털이 워낙에 많아서 수건으로 어느정도 말리고 드라이 해주려고 했는데 ㅠㅠ 수건도 금방 젖어버리고 무엇보다 강아지가 스트레스 받아하는것 같아서 구매했늠데.. 목욕후 건조시간 단축💗 너무좋구.. 애기가 스트레스 덜 받아하고 평소에도 폭신폭신해서 그런지 너무좋아해여.. 목욕타올이지만 마치 담요처럼 좋아라 하는 😬 구매하길 잘했습니당!! 만족만족 대만족!!
reviews.content_en: Since our pup has so much fur, I tried drying with a towel first before using the dryer ㅠㅠ but the towel got wet quickly and most importantly the pup seemed stressed, so I bought this... Drying time shortened after baths 💗 It's so good.. The baby gets less stressed and loves how fluffy and soft it is normally.. Even though it's a bath towel, they love it like it's a blanket 😬 Glad I bought it!! Satisfied, satisfied, very satisfied!!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 주변에서 추천해줘서 구입했는데 정말 좋네요.. 타올이 뭐 그렇게 중요하겠나 하고 사람껄로 닦아줬는데 확실히 다른게 느껴져요.. 돈이 아깝지 않은 좋은 구매였습니다. 우리 다지도 너무 좋아해요~
reviews.content_en: I bought it after friends recommended it and it's really good.. I thought 'why would a towel be that important' and used a human towel before, but I definitely notice the difference.. It was a good purchase worth the money. Our Daji loves it so much too~

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 타사제품도 있는데 이건 이중으로 되어 있더라구요 도톰도톰하니 마음에 들어요 유모차나 켄넬에 깔아줘도 좋을꺼같구요 극세사타올쓰면 확실히 금방 마르더라구요 하나는 털부자인 댕댕이가 하나는 머리숱부자인 제가 쓰려구요 ^^
reviews.content_en: There are other brands, but this one is double-layered and I like how thick and sturdy it is. I think it would be good to put in a stroller or kennel too. Microfiber towels definitely dry fast. One is for our furry pup and one is for me with thick hair haha ^^

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 아니 진짜 좋아요 친구가 좋대서 샀는데 수건 진짜 3장쓰던가 1장이면 되네요 반장??ㅋㅋ 두꺼워서 첨에 흡수 안되는거 처럼 느껴졌는데, 진짜 흡수력 좋아요 만점 드립니다...
reviews.content_en: No seriously, it's really good. My friend said it was good so I bought it, and where I used to need 3 towels, 1 is enough now. Half a towel?? lol At first it felt like it didn't absorb because it's thick, but the absorbency is actually really good. Perfect score...

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 목욕 후 수건으로 쓰기에도 아주 좋치만 일단 수건이 두껍고 폭식폭신 하니까 강아지가 너무 좋아해요 저는 집에서도 깔아두면 올라가 앉아있고 또 이동가방에도 깔고 자동차 안에서도 깔아줘요 수건으로도 좋치만 여기저기 다용도로 사용하기에 너무 좋아서 잘쓰고 있습니다.
reviews.content_en: It's great to use as a towel after baths, but since the towel is thick and fluffy, the dog absolutely loves it. I lay it down at home and the pup sits on it, I put it in the travel bag, and I lay it in the car too. It's good as a towel but it's so useful for all sorts of other purposes that I'm using it really well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 드라이미  아주 훌륭합니다 촉감도 부드럽고 흡수력은 말해뭐할까요 넘 좋아요 진작안산것을 후회하네요 좋은제품 많이많이만들어쥬세요 ♥
reviews.content_en: DRY ME is absolutely wonderful! The texture is soft and the absorbency is amazing - I'm so glad I got it. I regret not buying it sooner. Please make lots more of these great products! ♥

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 일단 감사합니다 바잇미 ㅠㅠ  저희 강아지는 드라이기 쓰는 거 진짜 싫어하는데, 드라이미 쓰면 거의 다 말라서 목욕시간이 엄청 짧아졌어요 사이즈만 조금 더 컸으면 딱이었을 것 같아여 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Thank you so much, BITE ME ㅠㅠ Our pup really hates using a blow dryer, but with DRY ME it dries almost completely so bath time is way shorter now! It would've been perfect if the size was just a bit bigger haha

reviews.name: 국****
reviews.content:
연남 바잇미 오프라인 매장에서 미니사이즈 구매해서 사용해보고 좋아서 바로 바잇미 어플 깔아서 재구매했어요!!
우즈는 매일 아침 저녁으로 산책해서 매일 두번을 닦여야 하는데 섬유가 촘촘하고 부드러워서 세밀하게 오염된 몸을 닦이기도 좋아요.
평소에는 목욕 후 가족들이 오래 쓴 낡은 수건을 물려받아 썼는데 물기 흡수가 잘 안됐어요.
바잇미 드라이미 대형 사이즈를 사용하니 드라이기를 쓰긴 해야 하지만 평소보다 털의 물기를 말리기가 쉽고 사용한 뒤에도 뽀송해서 한번 더 사용한 다음에 세탁을 했답니다.
큰 사이즈는 너무 커서 손세탁이 어렵고 꼭 망에 넣어 세탁기 돌려주세요.
먼저 구매한 미니버전 타올은 산책 후 닦이는 용도로. 바잇미 어플로 구매한 세트 타올은 털 물기 흡수로만 쓰고 있어요.
오래 잘 쓰겠습니다. 좋은 물건 만들어주셔서 감사합니다.
reviews.content_en:
I bought the mini size at the BITE ME offline store in Yeonnam, tried it and loved it, so I downloaded the BITE ME app right away and reordered!!
Wooz goes for walks twice a day every morning and evening so I have to dry him off twice a day. The fibers are tightly woven and soft, so it's great for carefully wiping down dirty fur.
I used to use an old worn-out towel that family members had used before after baths, but it didn't absorb water well.
Using the BITE ME DRY ME large size, I still need to use a blow dryer, but it's easier to dry the wet fur than before and it feels so fluffy afterward that I use it one more time before washing it.
The large size is so big that hand washing is difficult, so please wash it in a washing machine with a mesh laundry bag.
I use the mini version I bought first for wiping after walks, and the set towels I bought through the BITE ME app only for absorbing moisture from the fur.
I'll use it well for a long time. Thank you for making such a great product.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이 가격에 3가지 세트를 살 수 있다니 너무 좋은 걸용 ㅋ
큰거 하나 미니 두개구요
이전에 바잇미 큰 타올만 사용해봐서 좋은지는 알아요:)
건조기에 돌렸더니 쪼그라들어서;;;;
새로 산거는 자연건조 해야겠어요
그래도 잘 마르는 편이고 사용감 너무 좋습니다:)
reviews.content_en:
The fact that I can get a 3-piece set at this price is amazing ㅋ One large and two minis
I've only used the large BITE ME towel before so I know it's good :)
When I put it in the dryer it shrunk;;;;
I'll air dry the new ones
But they still dry well and the feel of using them is so good :)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
타사꺼 쓰다가 목욕타올 바꿔줄때가 되서 드라이미 미니 사용해보고 흡수력이 좋아서 구매했어요 미니 사용해봤을때 흡수력도 좋고 세탁망에 넣어 세탁함 망가짐 없이 좋던데 솔직히 미니는 쓸때마다 작다는 생각이 드네요
원래 정사각형 타올을 썼었던 터라 같이 주문 안했었는데 사이즈가 넉넉하니 괜찮을것 같아요
reviews.content_en:
I was using another brand and it was time to change the bath towel, so I tried the DRY ME mini and the absorbency was so good that I bought it. When I used the mini, the absorbency was great and washing it in a mesh bag didn't damage it, but honestly every time I use the mini I feel like it's a bit small.
Since I'd been using square towels before, I didn't order them together, but with the roomier size it should be fine.

reviews.name: 별****
reviews.content:
일반수건사이즈보다 커서 좋아요. 1+1이라 얼른 구매. 쓰던거있어서 쟁여두려고요. 
4키로 아이인데 수건이 커서 한장으로 충분할듯해요.  테두리부근 잡아당기니 털이 좀 빠지는데 몇번빼니 더이상 안빠지긴해요. 세탁해서 쓰면 괜찮겠죠
reviews.content_en:
It's great because it's bigger than a regular towel size. I bought it quickly because of the 1+1 deal. I'm going to save it since I have one in use already.
My 4kg baby - the towel is so big that one should be enough. The fur comes out a bit when I pull the edges, but after a few times it doesn't come out anymore. It should be fine once I wash it and use it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
와~사실 진짜 아무 기대 없이 주문한건데 방금 열자마자 놀랐어요 박스가 왜케 커?하며 열었는데 타올 박스도 넘 귀엽고
타올도 부피도 두껍고 부드럽고 정말 대박인건 석유냄새?같은거 1도 안나요 놀러서 코도 박아 맡아봤는데 바로써도 될것같은 기분이예요 기대 이상으로 타올이 좋아 진심놀랐습니다
오자마자 그래서 리뷰씁니다 잘쓸때요 좋은물건 원플원 감사요
reviews.content_en: Wow~ honestly I ordered it with no expectations at all but I was shocked as soon as I opened it. I was like 'why is the box so big?' and when I opened it, even the towel box was so cute, and the towel itself - it's thick, soft, and really amazing - and the best part is it doesn't smell like chemicals or anything? 0%. I was so shocked I even put my nose right up to it and smelled it, and it seems like I could use it right away. I was genuinely surprised the towel was so much better than expected, so I'm writing this review right after getting it. I'll use it well! Thank you so much for this great product!

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 애옹이라 목욕을 자주 하는건 아니지만 목욕타월 및 담요로 쓸 예정으로 구매했어요. 평상시 하우스에 깔아 줄려고요.. 재질이 꾹꾹이 엄청 할 재질인데요.. 엄청 크고 도통하고 부드럽네요.. 저만 구경하고 아직 애들한테 보여주지는 않았는데.. 전 만족합니다. 가격이 고가.. ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Since my kitty doesn't bathe often, I bought it to use as a bath towel and blanket. I'm planning to lay it out in the house normally. The material is super squishy and textured. It's incredibly big, breathable, and soft. I've only seen it myself and haven't shown it to the kids yet, but I'm satisfied. The price is a bit high though haha ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 집에있는 수건으로 목욕한번 해보고 안돼겠다 싶어 고르고 골라 바잇미제품으로 구매했는데 색상 디자인 품질 모두 너무 만족스러워용~~흡수력 짱짱이네용 ㅎㅎㅎ 더사고 싶어요~~^^
reviews.content_en: I tried bathing with a towel at home and thought 'this won't do,' so I carefully chose and bought a BITE ME product. I'm so satisfied with the color, design, and quality~~ The absorbency is fantastic ㅎㅎㅎ I want to buy more~~^^

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content: 목욕후 드라이기 사용으로 인한 피부 손상과 함께 피부 건조함이 더욱 극대화 되어 우연한 기회에 펫타올을 접하고 반신반의함에 구매해 봤어요. ㅎㅎ 와우 신세계예용ㅎㅎ 목욕후 펫타올로 쓰싹~ 쓰싹~  온 몸 구석 구석 문질렀을 뿐인데 물기가 쏘~옥 스며드네요.  몇분만에 뽀송♡뽀송 ㅎㅎ  이젠 드라이기는 잠시 안녕~~  우래기들 목욕후 펫 타올로 강추!
reviews.content_en: After bathing, using a blow dryer causes skin damage and extreme dryness. By chance I discovered pet towels and bought one with some doubt hehe. Wow, what a new world! hehe After bathing, I just wiped down the whole body with the pet towel - swish swish - and the water absorbs right in. In just a few minutes it's all fluffy♡fluffy hehe Now the blow dryer can take a break~~ Highly recommend pet towels after bath time for our pups!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
사이즈 넉넉하고 포근해서 넘 좋아요♡
물 흡수 잘 되어서 드라이 편해졌어요
아이도 좋아서 부비부비~ ^^
도톰하고 옐로우 포인트 마음에 듭니다
reviews.content_en: The size is generous and so cozy! ♡ It absorbs water really well, so drying is so much easier now. My pup loves it too and keeps nuzzling it~ ^^ I love how thick it is and the yellow accent details.

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 아이들 산책 후, 목욕 후 일반 타월을 쓰고 있었어요. 사람과 달리 아이들은 털이 많다 보니 일반 타월로는 흡수력이 좋지 않더라고요. 아이들에게 적합한 타월을 찾다 구매를 하게 되었는데요. 흡수력이 정말 짱짱하게 좋을 것 같이 도톰하고 재질도 너무 좋네요.
reviews.content_en: After my pups' walks and baths, I used to use regular towels. Since they have so much fur unlike us, regular towels just don't absorb well. I searched for a towel suited for them and decided to buy this one. The absorption is seriously amazing—it's so thick and the material quality is really great.

reviews.name: b****
reviews.content:
친구 반려견에게도 선물로 주려고 1+1으로 구매했습니다.
기존에 사용하던 Peth**** 제품 보다는 크기가 다소 작은 느낌이 있습니다. 가격 차이가 있으니 크기 차이는 별로 문제가 되지 않을 것 같아요. 그리고 작은 수건들은 외려 드라이미 제품이 크게 제작되었고 고리까지 달려 나옵니다. 재질은 비슷한 편인데 더 사용해 보고  두 제품의 차이를 비교해 보려고 합니다.
털이 이중 장모인 경우 한장으로 흡수가 다 되지 않을 수 있으니 1+1 추천드립니다. 그래도 일반 수건 보다는 훨씬 잘 닦이고 포근한 느낌이 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought the 1+1 deal to gift to a friend's dog too. It feels a bit smaller compared to the Peth**** product I used before. Since there's a price difference, the size difference doesn't seem like a big issue. And interestingly, the smaller towels in this DRYME set are actually made larger and even come with loops. The material is pretty similar, and I want to keep using them and compare the two products more thoroughly. For double-coated long-haired dogs, one towel might not absorb everything, so I'd recommend the 1+1 deal. That said, it dries much better than regular towels and feels really cozy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 안뇽하세요 여섯짤 말티즈 김돌돌이에요 누나가 두부엉아 팬이라서 팬심으로 자꼬 여기 주문한다하더라고여? 근데 내맘에도 들어요 요즘 핫템이 많은거같은데 젤 핫하다는 드라이미도  누나가 사왔어요 원쁠원이라고 얼마나 좋아하던지...박스샷꼭찍어야한다고 박스를 머리에 씌우고 사진찍길래 썩은표정 지어보았어요 목욕하고 나온거는 프라이버시니께 올리지말라했어요 제법 뽀송하니 잘마르네요 마음에들어요!! 어서 새로운아이템 계속 만들어서 누나가 내선물 마니 사오게 해주세요 -김돌돌드림-
reviews.content_en: Hi! I'm Kim Doldol, a six-year-old Maltese 🐕 My big sis is a huge fan of Tofu, so she keeps ordering from here for the love of it? But I like it too! There seem to be a lot of trending items these days, and even the hottest one—DRYME—my sis bought for me. She was so excited about the 1+1 deal... She even made me wear the box on my head to take a pic for the unboxing shot, so I made a grumpy face lol. I told her not to post pics of me right after my bath since that's my privacy 😤 It dries pretty fluffily and nicely! I love it!! Please keep making new items so my big sis keeps buying me more gifts 🎁 -From Kim Doldol-

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 두껍고 크기도 커서 타사 제품보다 좋은것같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's thick and large-sized, so it seems better than other brands' products.

reviews.name: 기****
reviews.content: 두툼하도 색도 예쁘고 무엇보다 1+1이어서 더 좋고 ㅎㅎ 흡수력도 최고!
reviews.content_en: It's thick and the color is pretty, and best of all it's a 1+1 deal so even better hehe 😄 The absorption power is top-notch!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
큰 타올이랑 미니 2개셋트 할인할때마다 주문해요.
가성비 좋은 타올입니다.
두께도 두툼하고 보들보들 물기흡수를 잘해요.
reviews.content_en: I order it whenever there's a discount on the large towel and mini 2-piece set. Great value for money. It's nice and thick, soft, and absorbs moisture really well.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 타 회사 제품 써보고 바잇미 제품을 우연히 접하고 너무 좋아사 3번째 구매해용! 가격도 저렴하고 제품력은 우수하고 크기도 커서 목욕하고 닦아주기 너무 좋아요🤍
reviews.content_en: After trying other brands, I happened to discover BITE ME and loved it so much I'm on my third purchase! The price is affordable, the product quality is excellent, and it's large-sized so it's perfect for drying my pup after a bath 🤍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
컥, 이거슨 진정 압도적 스케일의 타올이네용ㅋㅋ...
달랑 펫타올 두개 주문했는데, 택배박스가 왜케크징? 했더니 열어보고 사이즈에 깜놀했어용^^; 제가보기엔 수건이라기보다는 마치 아가들 담요나 이불가타용 푸항~~ 어서 애들 목욕후 사용해보려고 바로 세탁들어갔답니당!! 감사해요♡
reviews.content_en: Wow, this is seriously an overwhelmingly huge towel lol... I only ordered two pet towels, but why was the shipping box so big? When I opened it, I was shocked by the size ^^ Honestly, it looks more like a baby blanket or comforter than a towel ~ I immediately threw them in the wash to use after my pups' next bath! Thank you! ♡

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
펫타올 바로 세탁했어요
큼지막해서 놀랐구요 부들부들 좋아요
여유분으로 2장구입했어요
reviews.content_en: I washed the pet towel right away. I was surprised by how large it is and it feels really soft. I bought 2 extra ones as backup.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 완전 득템 한기분입니다..1+1이라서 구매했고 솔찍히 기대 안했는데 받고 기분이가 조아짐..두께감도 만족이고 크기도..너무 조아요..여러번 다름 제품 사고 후회 마니 했는데..완전 기대를 바까버린..너무 잘 쓸께요..
reviews.content_en: This is a total jackpot purchase! I bought it because of the 1+1 deal and honestly didn't have high expectations, but I'm so happy after receiving it..The thickness is satisfying and the size is perfect too..I love it so much..I've regretted many purchases after trying different products before..but this one totally exceeded my expectations..I'll use it so well..

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
작은사이즈를 찾아보느라 타사 타올을 먼저 사서 사용했는데 다른 제품이 없으니 비교할 대상이 없어서 부드럽다고 생각했었어요
근데 드라이미 받아보고 아.. 이게 부드러운거지 싶었어요ㅋㅋㅋ
확실히 더 두툼하고 더 부드럽고 빨아도 그대로여서 너무 좋았어요ㅠㅠ
다른 제품은 한두번 빠니까 재질자체가 좀 뻣뻣해지는 느낌도 나고 탁탁 털면 터는대로 모양이 틀어져서 두툼하고 견고하다는 느낌이 안들었는데 확실히 다르네요
털 말려줄 때도 부드럽고 두툼하니까 시간도 단축되구요..!
타올이 더 필요하게 되면 무조건 드라이미 재구매 예정이에요..
reviews.content_en:
I was looking for a small size and bought another brand's towel first, but since I didn't have anything to compare it to, I thought it was soft.
But after getting DRYMI, I was like... oh, THIS is what soft feels like ㅋㅋㅋ
It's definitely thicker, softer, and stays the same even after washing, so it's amazing ㅠㅠ
Other products get a bit stiff after just one or two washes, and when you shake the hair off, the shape gets distorted, so they don't feel thick and sturdy. But this is definitely different.
When drying the fur, it's so soft and thick that it also saves time..!
If I need another towel, I'm definitely planning to repurchase DRYMI..

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 1+1할때 저렴히 잘샀어요! 크기도크고 물흡수도 너무 잘되서 목욕할때 완전 잘 사용중이에요♡
reviews.content_en: I got it on a great deal with the 1+1 promotion! The size is big and the water absorption is amazing, so I'm using it perfectly during bath time ♡

reviews.name: v****
reviews.content: 원단도 두툼하고 색감도 좋아요 잘쓸게요!
reviews.content_en: The fabric is thick and the color looks great. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 크기가 생각보다 훨씬 커요. 사람 쓰는 수건정도 크기 생각하고 있었는데 강아지 몸 감싸고도 남을것같아요. 엄청 부드럽고 폭신해요. 털이 많은 포메라 이거 한장으로는 말릴때 부족하지만 전에 작은거 여러장 쓸때보다는 편해요. 물기 흡수 잘돼서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The size is much bigger than I expected. I was thinking of human-sized towel dimensions, but it looks like it would be enough to wrap around my dog's whole body. It's incredibly soft and fluffy. I have a Pomeranian with lots of hair, so one sheet isn't quite enough for drying, but it's more convenient than using several smaller ones before. The water absorption is really good.

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 흡수력이 장난아님다. 또구매할려고요
reviews.content_en: The absorbency is insane. I'm planning to buy it again.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
4kg대 폼피츠 강아지에요!! 전용 펫타올은 이번이 두번짼데..  진짜 깜짝 놀랐어요.
타올로 감싸고 탈탈 털어줬는데, 거짓말 아니고 드라이기로 초벌 드라이 한 느낌이 들만큼 뽀송해진거있죠!!! 진짜 진짜 추천합니다.
먼지도 안날리고 너무 좋았어요
reviews.content_en:
I have a 4kg Pomeranian!! This is my second time buying a dedicated pet towel..and I was genuinely shocked.
After wrapping the towel around and shaking off the water, it's no lie—the fur got so fluffy it felt like I'd done an initial blow dry with a hair dryer!!! I really, really recommend it.
No dust flying around either, it was amazing.

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 받자마자 세탁하고 아이에게 주는데 만져보니 아이가 처음부터 좋아할거란걸 알고있었지만 이렇게 좋아할줄은 몰랐어요◡̈ 세탁건조해주니 바로 올라가길래 하나는 목욕 후 드라이타올로 쓸거고 하나는 블랭킷처럼 쓰라고 집에 넣어주니 아주 꿀잠주무시네요◡̈
reviews.content_en: I washed it right after receiving it and gave it to my pet, and by touching it I knew they would like it from the start, but I didn't know they'd like it this much ◡̈ After washing and drying it, they jumped right on it, so I'm using one as a drying towel after baths and put the other in the house to use like a blanket, and they're sleeping so peacefully ◡̈

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 1+1 좋은 기회로 구매했어요~! 도톰하고 부드러워서 물기 흡수가 잘될것 같아요 색상도 예쁩니다ㅎㅎ 마음에 들어요!!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a great 1+1 opportunity~! It's thick and soft, so the water absorption should be great. The color is pretty too ㅎㅎ I love it!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 원쁠원해서 급한마음에 구매했습니다. 포메라 털말릴때 진짜 미치는데.. 확실히 진짜 좋아요. 시간은 못재봤는데, 시간은 3분의1정도 단축한거 같아요. 엄마가 신통방통하다고 본인 샤워하고 쓰셨는데, 사람한테는 잘 안되는거같아요.. 엄마피셜 긴털이라 물기가 몸에 뽀송하게 안된대요. 근데 일반수건 몇장을쓰던 저희집 강아지 3.7키로 기준 한장으로 충분해요~ 행사 또하면 또쟁이고싶어요...  바잇미제품 장난감 이후 두번째 구매인데 진짜 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought it in a rush with the 1+1 deal. It's seriously crazy for drying my Pomeranian's fur.. it's definitely really good. I didn't time it, but it seems like it cut the drying time to about a third. My mom used it after her own shower and said it's amazing, but it doesn't seem to work as well for people.. According to my mom, since human hair is longer, the moisture doesn't get fluffy on the body. But for our 3.7kg dog, one sheet is enough compared to using several regular towels~ If they have this promotion again, I'll definitely buy it...This is my second BITE ME purchase after a toy, and I'm really satisfied.
